predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person.

predicates.name: leaves_ascendant_relatives
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves relatives in the ascending line.

predicates.name: leaves_close_collateral_relatives
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: leaves_ascendants_or_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves ascendant relatives or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: deceased_share_in_community_property
predicates.description: The asset represents the deceased person's share in the community property.

predicates.name: deceased_share_in_exclusive_spousal_coownership
predicates.description: The asset represents the deceased person's share in property held exclusively between spouses in co-ownership.

predicates.name: other_asset_of_deceased_own_property
predicates.description: The asset is another asset of the deceased person's own property.

predicates.name: asset_subject_to_legal_return_right
predicates.description: The asset is subject to a statutory right of legal return in relation to the deceased person.

predicates.name: gift_deed_or_will_provides_otherwise
predicates.description: A deed of gift or will provides otherwise for the asset in relation to the deceased person.

predicates.name: obtains_full_ownership_from_deceased
predicates.description: The surviving spouse obtains full ownership of the asset from the deceased person's estate.

predicates.name: obtains_usufruct_from_deceased
predicates.description: The surviving spouse obtains usufruct of the asset from the deceased person's estate.
